name: Nanoscale Fission Pellet Reactor
blurb: Nano-encapsulated fissile particles generate power at microscopic scale without critical-mass risk.

name: Cellular Torpor Induction Array
blurb: Nanoparticles selectively slow cellular metabolism to induce safe, reversible hibernation states.

name: Molecular Logic Gate Fabric
blurb: Nanoscale switches assembled into computing substrates orders of magnitude denser than silicon.

name: Recursive Self-Replicating Assembler
blurb: Nanobots that design and build improved successors, bootstrapping toward a technological singularity.

name: Swarm-Skinned Humanoid Chassis
blurb: Robot bodies sheathed in programmable nanoparticle skin that senses, heals, and reconfigures in real time.

name: Autonomous IT Infrastructure Cortex
blurb: AI that monitors, provisions, and heals entire enterprise networks without human intervention.

name: Phenotype Prediction Engine
blurb: AI models map genetic edits to likely physical and behavioral outcomes before any organism is modified.

name: Quantum-Accelerated Inference Core
blurb: Quantum co-processors run probabilistic AI inference tasks exponentially faster than classical hardware.

name: Recursive Goal Alignment Protocol
blurb: Narrow AI continuously audits and corrects the objective functions of emerging general intelligence systems.

name: Generative Holographic Scene Synthesis
blurb: AI composes photorealistic three-dimensional light-field scenes from natural-language descriptions in real time.

name: Adaptive Pixel-Perfect Display Driver
blurb: AI adjusts LCD subpixel timing and backlighting per-frame to eliminate motion blur and eye strain.

name: Genomic Data Compliance Stack
blurb: IT infrastructure purpose-built to store, audit, and govern access to sensitive genetic engineering datasets.

name: CRISPR Workflow Automation Platform
blurb: Software pipelines design, simulate, and schedule CRISPR edits from target gene to lab robot instruction.

name: AGI-Managed Knowledge Fabric
blurb: General intelligence autonomously indexes, cross-links, and serves the entire corpus of human IT knowledge.

name: Dyson-Scale Data Telemetry Grid
blurb: IT infrastructure spanning a stellar megastructure, routing petawatts of sensor data across solar distances.

name: Photonic Display Network Protocol
blurb: IT standards enabling zero-latency LCD display arrays to act as a unified distributed visual output bus.

name: Germline Blueprint Archive
blurb: Cloned cell libraries with engineered genetic profiles held ready for therapeutic or research reactivation.

name: Quantum Fidelity Cell Verification
blurb: Quantum algorithms verify clone genetic identity at single-nucleotide resolution faster than sequencing.

name: Post-Singularity Substrate Duplication
blurb: After the singularity, exact cognitive and biological patterns are replicated across arbitrarily many substrates.

name: Holographic Clone Identity Mirror
blurb: Full-body holographic scans capture phenotypic signatures used to verify and distinguish cloned individuals.

name: Closed-Cycle Breeder Sustainability Loop
blurb: Breeder reactors consume their own waste, closing the fuel cycle to near-zero long-lived radioactive output.

name: Radioisotope-Enhanced Contrast MRI
blurb: Short-lived reactor-produced isotopes act as MRI contrast agents that clear the body within hours.

name: Reactor Anomaly Prediction Network
blurb: Neural networks trained on reactor sensor streams predict coolant failures and criticality excursions hours early.

name: Adaptive Core Load Optimizer
blurb: Machine learning continuously adjusts control rod positions to maximize fuel burn efficiency and grid stability.

name: Fission-Ignited Fusion Torch
blurb: A fission pulse compresses fusion fuel to ignition, eliminating the need for massive superconducting magnets.

name: Carbon Credit Immutable Ledger
blurb: Blockchain tokenises verified carbon offsets, preventing double-counting and fraudulent retirement of credits.

name: Precision Ecological Restoration Fleet
blurb: Autonomous robots plant, monitor, and selectively weed degraded land at hectare-per-day scale.

name: Earth Climate Restoration Protocol
blurb: Controlled planetary-scale interventions reverse anthropogenic damage using terraforming engineering tools.

name: Green Data Storage Tiering
blurb: Hard drives spin down to near-zero power when data is cold, cutting data-center energy use significantly.

name: Multilingual Sustainability Policy Translator
blurb: Machine translation bridges language gaps in international climate negotiations, accelerating binding agreements.

name: Scan-Transmitted Medical Image Relay
blurb: MRI outputs are faxed as lossless compressed packets to remote radiologists for immediate telehealth review.

name: Neural Handwriting Restoration Engine
blurb: Neural networks reconstruct garbled or partial fax transmissions into clean, readable document images.

name: Legacy Signal Modernisation Bridge
blurb: Machine learning translates fax protocols to modern APIs, preserving access to regulatory-mandated fax archives.

name: Fusion-Powered Global Fax Backbone
blurb: Unlimited fusion energy finally makes the global telephone fax network's idle standby draw a rounding error.

name: Tokenised Gene Patent Registry
blurb: Genetic sequence IP is minted as non-fungible tokens, enabling transparent royalty flows for engineered organisms.

name: Quantum-Resistant Distributed Ledger
blurb: Cryptocurrency protocols rebuilt on post-quantum cryptography survive attacks from full-scale quantum computers.

name: AGI-Governed Autonomous Treasury
blurb: General intelligence manages a decentralised fund, allocating capital to projects based on outcome evidence.

name: Holographic Commerce Proof Layer
blurb: Cryptographic tokens authenticate ownership of holographic objects traded in persistent light-field marketplaces.

name: Pixel-Level Micropayment Display
blurb: LCD panels render per-pixel micro-ads billed in real-time cryptocurrency without disrupting primary content.

name: Tether Biopolymer Growth Scaffold
blurb: CRISPR-engineered organisms secrete ultra-strong cable material directly along space elevator tether forms.

name: Orbital Ascent Traffic Controller
blurb: AGI coordinates cargo, passenger, and payload scheduling across thousands of simultaneous elevator climbers.

name: Equatorial Tether Dyson Feed
blurb: Space elevator delivers raw mass from Earth's surface into a Dyson swarm construction supply chain.

name: Climber Cabin Wraparound Display
blurb: Floor-to-ceiling LCD walls in elevator cabins show live Earth curvature as passengers ascend to geostationary orbit.

name: Iterative Precision Genome Sculpting
blurb: CRISPR edits are systematically validated then applied in sequence to engineer complex multigenic traits reliably.

name: AGI Synthetic Biology Codesigner
blurb: General intelligence proposes and validates novel gene circuits faster than any human research team.

name: Stellar-Environment Adapted Organism
blurb: Genetically engineered extremophiles survive and work in the radiation and vacuum near Dyson megastructures.

name: Bioluminescent Pixel Matrix Display
blurb: Engineered cells arranged in a grid emit controlled light, forming a living, self-repairing display surface.

name: Quantum-Timed Metabolic Pause
blurb: Quantum sensors track cellular state with femtosecond precision, enabling perfectly controlled metabolic suspension.

name: Pre-Singularity Suspension Vault
blurb: Individuals enter hibernation to skip forward past civilisational discontinuity and wake in a post-singularity world.

name: Hibernation-State Holographic Monitoring
blurb: Holographic sensors image suspended patients in full 3D continuously without requiring physical contact.

name: Graphene-Coil Ultra-High-Field MRI
blurb: Graphene superconducting coils achieve magnetic fields far beyond niobium, resolving sub-millimetre brain structures.

name: Quantum-State Tissue Teleporter
blurb: MRI maps tissue quantum states precisely enough for teleportation protocols to reconstruct pathological samples remotely.

name: Simultaneous Morpho-Functional Scanner
blurb: Merged MRI-CT gantry delivers anatomical structure and metabolic function in a single uninterrupted scan.

name: Targeted Contrast Nanoparticle Platform
blurb: Biotech-engineered particles seek specific tumour markers and amplify MRI signal only at disease sites.

name: Graphene Gene-Delivery Nanocarrier
blurb: Graphene oxide sheets ferry CRISPR machinery through cell membranes with lower toxicity than viral vectors.

name: Graphene Neuromorphic Wafer
blurb: AGI architectures etched directly into graphene substrates achieve brain-like density and picowatt operation.

name: Dyson Photovoltaic Shell Laminate
blurb: Graphene photovoltaic films tile a star-enclosing megastructure, converting stellar output with near-perfect efficiency.

name: Graphene Electrowetting Display Panel
blurb: Graphene electrodes individually actuate pixel fluid droplets, producing reflective displays that need no backlight.

name: Presence-Teleported VR Embodiment
blurb: Teleported sensory state lets a person inhabit a remote physical location through a VR interface in real time.

name: Immersive Environment Intrusion Sandbox
blurb: VR arenas safely contain and test malicious code by trapping it in simulated system environments it cannot escape.

name: Haptic Surgical Training Simulator
blurb: VR environments with biotech-accurate tissue feedback train surgeons in procedures before any patient contact.

name: Continuous Sensorimotor Learning Robot
blurb: Neural networks embedded in robot control loops update motor policies live from proprioceptive feedback.

name: Intraoperative CT-Guided Surgical Robot
blurb: Robot arms adjust instrument trajectories in real time as CT slices update the tissue model mid-procedure.

name: Plasma-Tolerant Maintenance Robot
blurb: Robots withstand fusion reactor EM fields to perform first-wall inspection and repair between plasma pulses.

name: Off-Target Cut Prediction Network
blurb: Neural networks predict every unintended CRISPR cut site in a genome before the guide RNA is synthesised.

name: Guide RNA Fitness Learner
blurb: Machine learning ranks guide RNA candidates by editing efficiency, reducing wet-lab screening by two orders of magnitude.

name: Radiation-Hardened Genome Repair Kit
blurb: CRISPR cassettes implanted in fusion plant workers correct radiation-induced DNA damage on a scheduled basis.

name: Variational Quantum Neural Solver
blurb: Quantum circuits implement neural-network layers, dramatically shrinking the parameter count for hard optimisation problems.

name: Quantum Tomographic Reconstruction Engine
blurb: Quantum algorithms invert CT projection data exponentially faster, enabling real-time 4D volumetric imaging.

name: Plasma Confinement Quantum Optimizer
blurb: Quantum computers solve MHD instability equations in milliseconds, keeping fusion plasma confined far longer.

name: Planetary Atmospheric Simulation Grid
blurb: Distributed computing models millennia of terraforming chemistry in days, revealing unintended atmospheric feedback loops.

name: Zero-Trust Compute Isolation Kernel
blurb: Every computing process runs in a cryptographically sealed enclave, eliminating lateral movement after a breach.

name: Covert Cognitive Payload Detector
blurb: Computing systems scan information streams for embedded psychological conditioning patterns targeting human users.

name: Self-Transcending Architecture Search
blurb: Neural networks design improved neural networks recursively, each generation outpacing the last toward singularity.

name: Neural Scene Radiance Field Synthesiser
blurb: Neural networks compute holographic light-field outputs from sparse sensor captures in real time.

name: Terraforming Material Beaming Network
blurb: Teleportation of bulk molecules delivers ammonia or water ice to a target planet without rocket infrastructure.

name: Quantum-Channel Authentication Protocol
blurb: Teleportation of quantum states underpins unhackable identity verification that collapses under any eavesdropping attempt.

name: Memetic Payload Teleinjection Vector
blurb: Teleported information states could in principle implant cognitive patterns directly, bypassing conscious critical filters.

name: Adaptive Terraforming Strategy Learner
blurb: Machine learning revises planetary engineering plans as real atmospheric data diverges from simulation predictions.

name: Fusion-Powered Atmospheric Forge
blurb: Fusion reactors on a barren world drive industrial-scale gas production, building breathable atmospheres over centuries.

name: Post-Scarcity Value Consensus Chain
blurb: Blockchain coordinates resource allocation among post-singularity superintelligences operating beyond human economic logic.

name: Robot Identity Ownership Ledger
blurb: Blockchain records legal personhood, warranty, and task contracts for autonomous humanoid robots.

name: Intelligence Explosion Bootstrap Layer
blurb: AGI iteratively rewrites its own architecture, compressing the time between human-level and far-superhuman cognition.

name: Embodied General Reasoning Platform
blurb: AGI housed in a humanoid body acquires grounded physical intuitions impossible to learn from text data alone.

name: Post-Singularity Diagnostic Imager
blurb: Superintelligent systems redesign CT from first principles, eliminating radiation while achieving atomic-scale resolution.

name: Singularity-Catalysed Fusion Ignition
blurb: Superintelligent optimisation finally solves net-gain plasma confinement within years of the singularity crossing.

name: Predictive Spindle Failure Sensor
blurb: Machine learning reads HDD vibration and SMART telemetry to predict drive failure days before data loss.

name: Personalised Influence Vector Mapper
blurb: Machine learning identifies which cognitive biases an individual is most susceptible to and how to exploit them.

name: Field-Deployable Robotic CT Unit
blurb: Humanoid robots transport, assemble, and operate compact CT scanners in disaster zones without radiology staff.

name: Encrypted At-Rest Drive Attestation
blurb: Hard drives cryptographically attest their own encryption state to the host OS, blocking cold-boot extraction attacks.

name: Cross-Lingual Threat Intelligence Relay
blurb: Machine translation surfaces cyberattack indicators buried in foreign-language dark-web forums for global CERT teams.

name: Long-Term Biological Sequence Archive
blurb: High-density hard drives preserve petabyte genomic and proteomic databases for multi-decade biotech research continuity.

name: Stellar Ignition Harvesting Shell
blurb: A Dyson structure captures fusion-derived power from a star optimised by human-ignited stellar core engineering.

name: Plasma Confinement Visual Debugger
blurb: Holographic displays render live fusion plasma topology in three dimensions, letting engineers spot instabilities instantly.

name: Biohybrid Actuated Robot Body
blurb: Lab-grown muscle tissue drives humanoid robot limbs, yielding silent, energy-efficient motion with organic compliance.

name: Fusion Plant Multilingual Command Interface
blurb: Real-time translation lets multinational reactor crews issue and confirm safety commands in their native languages.

name: Subliminal Refresh-Rate Conditioning Display
blurb: LCD panels insert imperceptible frames at precise intervals to prime viewer emotional states without conscious awareness.
